_fixtureScope: Known subset for DeckKit engine tests; not a complete jurisdiction package.
_sourceNotes: AWC DCA6-15 Table 2: 2x8 Spruce-Pine-Fir No. 2 joist at 16 in. o.c. spans 11 ft 1 in. under 40 psf live load and 10 psf dead load.
AWC DCA6-15 Table 3A: 2-2x10 Spruce-Pine-Fir No. 2 beam supporting a 10 ft joist span spans 6 ft 3 in.
AWC DCA6-15 Table 4: 6x6 Spruce-Pine-Fir No. 2 post at 6 ft beam span and joist span up to 10 ft has a 14 ft maximum post height.
AWC DCA6-15 guard section references the IRC R312 30 in. trigger and 36 in. required guard height.
AWC DCA6-15 stair section references IRC R311.7, 36 in. minimum stair width, 4-riser handrail trigger, and 34-38 in. handrail height.

ledgerRules.codeSection: IRC R507.2.4 / AWC DCA6-15 lateral load connection

stairRules.stairCodeSection: IRC R311.7 / AWC DCA6-15 Stair Requirements
stairRules.handrailCodeSection: IRC R311.7.8 / AWC DCA6-15 Stair handrail requirements

postHeightTable.limitingCheck: 6x6 SPF #2 post at 6 ft beam span and <=10 ft joist span
